title: Get Fat
description: Eat too much and get fat.
body:
**GetFat**

Eating past a full hunger bar makes you gain weight. The more you eat, the fatter you get. Walking makes you lose weight again.

**Effects of gaining weight:**
- Your body grows wider (hitbox included)
- Movement speed decreases
- Gravity increases
- Jumping carries less horizontal momentum

Force-feed other players by right-clicking them with food.

**Required on both client and server.**

Commands (op only): `/weight set/add/reset`
`/weight get` is available to all players.
